segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary in a wooden-fenced rural enclosure, focused on skinning a large animal pelt mounted at chest height. The repetitive animation shows the character using a small blade to scrape the fur, with traditional thatched-roof buildings and autumn trees visible in the warm afternoon light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective within a rural enclosure, focusing on the tactile process of preparing an animal pelt. It begins with the character standing stationary, using a small blade to scrape the fur of a large pelt mounted at chest height. As the repetitive skinning animation continues, the camera captures the surrounding environment of traditional thatched-roof buildings and wooden fencing. The scene remains anchored in this singular activity, bathed in the warm, golden glow of afternoon light that illuminates the autumn foliage of the nearby trees.
